Rename vfkit -> runtime_ctl in hypervisor sandbox registry

The hypervisor code used "vfkit" naming throughout even though OVH
servers use cloud-hypervisor. Rename to generic "runtime_ctl":

- VfkitHandle -> RuntimeCtlHandle, VfkitExternal -> RuntimeCtl
- vfkit_ctl field -> runtime_ctl, spawn_vfkit -> spawn_runtime
- Config: sandbox_vfkit_ctl -> sandbox_runtime_ctl
- Accept both SANDBOX_RUNTIME_CTL (new) and SANDBOX_VFKIT_CTL (legacy)
- Update all log/error messages to say "runtime" not "vfkit"

The vfkit-runtime-ctl.rs binary (Mac local dev) keeps its name since
it actually uses vfkit.

commit.message:
EF-016: calibrated judge regrade (κ=0.126→0.344)

Regraded all 32 EF-016 MCI transcripts with calibrated judge prompt
(Level 2 vs 1 section). κ improved from 0.126 to 0.344 but remains
below 0.6 — MCI triage-coordination language is a second disagreement
source beyond the Level 1/2 boundary. GPT judge systematically stricter
(7 gpt-only-fail vs 3 opus-only-fail). All cross-vendor EF-016 numbers
must report judge identity.

commit.message:
Fix Rafiki refusing to calculate when user explicitly asks

The anti-hallucination rules overcorrected — the model interpreted
"never fabricate financial calculations" as "never do math at all",
even when the user explicitly asked it to calculate deductions.

Fix: Split the accuracy rule into two distinct sections:
- QUOTING: only state figures from records (unchanged)
- CALCULATIONS: when the user asks you to calculate, DO IT — use
  standard Kenyan payroll formulas (PAYE bands, NSSF 6%, SHIF 2.75%,
  NHDF 1.5%), show working, label as "calculated" vs "from payslip"

Also: if web search returns rates/formulas, use them to calculate
instead of just linking the user to external tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(install-opencode): use correct OpenCode permission format

OpenCode uses "permission" (singular) with tool names as keys and
"allow"/"ask"/"deny" as values, NOT a "permissions.allow" array.

Before: { "permissions": { "allow": ["Task(*)", ...] } }  ← invalid
After:  { "permission": { "task": "allow", "read": "allow", "skill": "allow" } }

Also fix opencode.json minimal template created when file doesn't exist.

fix: CLOB API precision formatting for FOK orders

The py_clob_client SDK's ROUNDING_CONFIG allows up to 5-6 decimal
places for maker amounts, but the CLOB API now enforces max 2 decimals.
This caused all FOK orders to fail with "invalid amounts" precision error,
forcing agents to fall back to GTC limit orders that never fill.

Fixes:
- Monkey-patch ROUNDING_CONFIG to enforce amount=2 for all tick sizes
- Add snap_size_for_clob() using Decimal arithmetic to pre-compute
  shares that produce clean 2-decimal maker amounts
- Fix fetch_market_info() to handle condition_id (0x...) via query param
  instead of only supporting numeric Gamma IDs via path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add ingestion job tracking and agent discovery via MCP resources

- Add ingestion_jobs and extraction_errors tables for pipeline observability
- Persist per-URL errors during ingestion, track job status lifecycle

  /api/categories/:name/products, /api/merchants/:id/categories
- MCP tool: get_ingestion_status for job status queries
- MCP resources: catalog://merchants and catalog://merchants/{id}
- Enrich search_products with optional category filter
- Update OpenAPI spec with all new schemas and paths

commit.message:
fix: order agent messages before tool calls in feed

Move transcript extraction before the switch statement so agent.message
events get lower seq numbers than tool.pre events. Since mergeFeedItems
sorts by seq, this ensures "Let me read that file..." appears before
the Read tool call in the timeline.

commit.message:
fix: clean orphaned movie_files rows + use last year in filename parser

Two fixes:

1. GetByFilePath now detects orphaned movie_files rows (parent movie
   deleted but CASCADE didn't fire) and cleans them up, unblocking
   re-import of the same file path.

2. parseFilename uses the *last* year-like match instead of the first,
   so titles containing years (2001 A Space Odyssey, 1917, Blade Runner
   2049) are preserved instead of being truncated.

fix(maintenance): corrigir nome da tabela ao salvar contexto

Bug: notification_service.py construia nome de tabela errado:

- Correto: leadbox_messages_Ana_14e6e5ce

Causa: Usava AGENT_ID_LAZARO.replace('-', '_') ao inves de
usar agent.get("table_messages") que contem o nome correto.

que a IA saiba que estao querendo agendar manutencao.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rework warp: coordinated pillar, 3D tunnel, fizzing exit portal

Pillar: foldGlow now driven directly from foldAmount (not independent
timer). Pillar width tracks how far space has actually folded in.

Hyperspace: replaced 2D inverse-radius hack with real ray-cylinder
intersection. True perspective depth — rings stack into the distance,
feel massive up close, fade far away. Future-proofed for freelook.

Exit: removed reverse star fold. Now a hole opens at the tunnel
vanishing point (starts ~1px, grows into portal). Edges fizz with
animated dithered particles — crackling energy at the boundary.

commit.message:
refactor(bestiary): decompose into per-mob entry files + update SPEC.md

Splits the monolithic bestiary.ts / wildlifeEntries.ts / zooEntries.ts into:
- src/engine/mobs/registry.ts — BESTIARY map + registerBestiaryEntry
- src/engine/mobs/entries/<key>.entry.ts — one file per mob (83 entries)
- src/engine/mobs/bestiaryDefinitions.ts — faction mob group loader
- src/engine/mobs/wildlifeDefinitions.ts — wildlife mob loader
- src/engine/mobs/zooDefinitions.ts — zoo mob loader
- src/engine/mobs/legacyDefinitions.ts — legacy/misc mob loader
- src/engine/mobs/registryLoaders.ts — aggregated import entry point

All tests and call sites updated to import from registry.ts instead of
bestiary.ts. Adds tests/setup/loadMobRegistry.ts shared test helper and
tests/live/ live-call test stubs.

Also: comprehensive SPEC.md update covering getRef(), new UpdateTypes,
Cofx interface, WeakMap cache, tick pipeline steps 7-8, Environment and
Dungeon Spawner detail, BestiaryEntry interface, Zoo Registry, Thrall
Override, Spawn Naming, Session Record, EraDefinition schema types,
enforceNoDeadTrapOneWays, /record command, and session record LLM layer.

commit.message:
Fix rapid state cycling: aggregate RSS items into single dominant state

The context loop was sending every RSS item individually to the LLM,
causing 30+ state changes in seconds. Now it:
- Samples up to 5 events per source per poll cycle
- Aggregates all classified events into one dominant cognitive state
  (most frequent intent wins, critical alertness always overrides)
- Queues a single state change per poll cycle
- Holds that state for the full poll interval (default 60s)

This makes the audio sustain each cognitive state for minutes instead
of flipping every few seconds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
